description.content:
Create a new evaluation

This endpoint supports:
- Environment evaluations: Provide environments
- Prime RL evaluations: Provide run_id
- Suite evaluations: Provide suite_id

Ownership:
- If team_id is provided in request, the evaluation will be owned by the team
- Otherwise, the evaluation will be owned by the authenticated user
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

  "name": "<string>",
  "team_id": "<string>",
  "environments": [

description.content:
Get a list of evaluations owned by the authenticated user or their teams

By default, returns all evaluations the user has access to (personal + all teams).

response.name: Successful Response

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

Run and manage model evaluations against the Environments Hub. Includes both client-driven evaluations (push samples, finalize, retrieve) and hosted evaluations executed by Prime Intellect with logs, cancellation, and selectable inference models.

Contact Support:
 Name: Prime Intellect
